<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id">
<head>

html,body{height:100%;font-family:'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ivory);overflow:hidden}
body{display:flex;flex-direction:column}

/* ── SCROLLBAR ── */

/* ── LOGIN ── */
#login{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:999;background:var(--bg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:1.5rem}
.login-logo{text-align:center}
.login-logo img{width:100px;height:100px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--teal);padding:8px;background:var(--s1)}
.login-logo .brand{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--teal);margin-top:.5rem;letter-spacing:.05em}

.login-err{color:var(--ember);font-size:.72rem;margin-top:.5rem;min-height:1em}

/* ── APP ── */
#app{display:none;flex-direction:column;height:100vh;height:100dvh}
.topbar{background:var(--s1);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(10,191,188,.15);padding:.6rem 1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.topbar-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem}

.btn-sm{padding:.35rem .7rem;font-size:.72rem}
.btn-full{width:100%}

/* ── FORM ── */
.field{margin-bottom:.75rem}
.field label{display:block;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--ash);margin-bottom:.3rem;font-weight:600}

.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:500;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:1rem}
